mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (id, name, description, is_builtin, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isBuiltIn}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO model_type (id, category_id, name, description, is_builtin, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{modelType.typeId}, #{categoryId}, #{modelType.name}, #{modelType.description}, #{modelType.isBuiltIn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name, c.description AS c_description, c.is_builtin AS c_is_builtin, mt.id AS mt_id, mt.name AS mt_name, mt.description AS mt_description, mt.is_builtin AS mt_is_builtin FROM category c LEFT JOIN model_type mt ON c.id = mt.category_id WHERE c.id = #{categoryId}
SELECT id, name, description, is_builtin, create_time, update_time FROM category

SELECT c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name, c.description AS c_description, c.is_builtin AS c_is_builtin, mt.id AS mt_id, mt.name AS mt_name, mt.description AS mt_description, mt.is_builtin AS mt_is_builtin FROM category c LEFT JOIN model_type mt ON c.id = mt.category_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
